import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []

mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        let val = if neg
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        if val % 2 == 0
          evens = list.push(evens, val)
        else
          odds = list.push(odds, val)
        end
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      neg = true
      has = true
    else if b == 43
      has = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has
  let val = if neg
    -cur
  else
    cur
  end
  if val % 2 == 0
    evens = list.push(evens, val)
  else
    odds = list.push(odds, val)
  end
end

mut evens_str = "evens="
mut first = true
for v in evens
  if first
    evens_str = "#{evens_str}#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{v}"
  end
end

mut odds_str = "odds="
mut first2 = true
for v in odds
  if first2
    odds_str = "#{odds_str}#{v}"
    first2 = false
  else
    odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{v}"
  end
end

println(evens_str)
println(odds_str)
